title: rubus × pseudo-oreus
intro: Rubus × pseudo-oreus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or pseudo-raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Japanese raspberry (Rubus ellipticus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help soothe digestive issues and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits associated with Rubus × pseudo-oreus include potential improvements in cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × pseudo-oreus, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
